summary: The test suite has good coverage of core functionality (parsing, license checking, report generation) with well-organized unit tests and act-based integration tests. However, it has notable gaps: missing unit tests for config/license-db file error handling, limited act test coverage (3 cases, package.json only, when requirements.txt should also be tested via act), and a concerning assumption about workflow output format (expects 'RESULT compliant=...' format not produced by the implementation). The design mixes act and non-act tests despite the requirement that 'every single test case must execute through the GitHub Actions workflow via act'. While the test suite would catch many regressions, it needs additional error-case coverage and alignment with stated requirements.
